title: CBDT Directs Income Tax Offices to Remain Open on March 31, 2026 Despite Holiday
content:
# CBDT Directs Income Tax Offices to Remain Open on March 31, 2026 Despite Holiday

Ek important update hai. Government ne financial year closing ke liye Income Tax Offices ko March 31, 2026 ko open rakhne ka direction announce kiya hai.

*   **Reason:** Financial Year 2025-26 March 31, 2026 ko close ho raha hai, aur us din Mahavir Jayanti ki chutti hai. Departmental work smooth tarike se complete ho sake, isliye yeh step liya gaya hai.
*   **Directive:** Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne order kiya hai ki India ke sabhi Income Tax Offices March 31, 2026 ko open rahenge.
*   **Authority:** Yeh direction Income-tax Act, 1961 ke Section 119 ke powers use karte hue issue kiya gaya hai, administrative convenience ke liye.
*   **Order Details:** Official Order F.No.225/53/2024-ITA-II dated March 18, 2026 ko issue kiya gaya hai.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometaxindia.gov.in/news/order-under-section-119-of-the-income-tax-act-1961-18-3-26.pdf)

*Published on: 28 March 2026*
